name: TSMC-Amkor Arizona model comparison
location: Arizona model compared with Southeast Asia
description: front-end fab anchor plus local OSAT packaging partnership model
supports_which_strategy: Optimize Singapore Fab 12i P3 / No New External Expansion
relevance_to_umc: TSMC-Amkor Arizona works because of a front-end fab anchor, local packaging gap, OSAT capex, government subsidies, and anchor customer demand. For UMC Southeast Asia, Singapore Fab 12i P3 is already the main front-end anchor.
limitation: Comparable model only; does not prove UMC customer demand, partner economics, incentives, or ROIC in Southeast Asia.
